creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Thanks for the report, but please submit a patch against the ports tree, ideally created with `svn diff`.

Please don't forget to confirm that the changes pass QA (portlint, poudriere).

Also please don't forget to set the maintainer-approval(+) flag on attachments (under attachment Details) on patches for ports you're maintainer of.
